reasoning: Without successful retrieval of the FRED data, I rely on the general properties of the 'Cash Assets, All Commercial Banks' series. Given the lack of specific local trend data for late 2025, I assign a weak prior for an increase in the short term due to potential positive drift or autocorrelation.
